items.name: Limited Silver Chain
items.description:
Ay, check it out, we got a silver-colored chain with "Silver" engraved on it, for all the wannabe traders out there who can't afford the real limited gold chain. This may not be real Gold, but it still looks fresh and will definitely catch some attention. Perfect for all you traders trying to front like you got stacks. This piece is for all you struggling traders out there trying to make it big, so cop one of these before you hit it big and can afford the real deal. It's a stepping stone on the way to the top.

Modeled and textured by @Pharao13
